contentBlocks.original:
लक्ष्मी देवी कनकरुचिरां विष्णुपत्नी सुहासाम्
गौरी देवी पशुपति मनोल्लासिनी अर्धनारीम् ।
वाणीं देवीं सुरवरनुतां सर्व कामार्थ सिध्दयै
वंदे ब्रह्म प्रियतमसतिं सर्व विद्या प्रदात्रीम् ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
lakṣmī devī kanakarucirāṃ viṣṇupatnī suhāsām
gaurī devī paśupati manollāsinī ardhanārīm .
vāṇīṃ devīṃ suravaranutāṃ sarva kāmārtha sidhdayai
vaṃde brahma priyatamasatiṃ sarva vidyā pradātrīm ..
contentBlocks.translation: Goddess Lakshmi, beautiful-as-gold, Vishnu's consort, pleasant smiling, goddess Gouri, the joy of the half-lady-featured Lord Pasupathi, goddess Vaani, worshipped by good musical notes, Brahma's beloved and chaste consort, bestower of all education, bow to her before study for fulfilment of all desires.
contentBlocks.meanings: लक्ष्मी (lakṣmī) – Goddess Lakshmi; देवी (devī) – goddess; कनकरुचिरां (kanakarucirām) – beautiful-as-gold (kanaka:gold | rucirām:beautiful); विष्णुपत्नी (viṣṇupatnī) – Vishnu's consort (viṣṇu:Vishnu | patnī:consort); सुहासाम् (suhāsām) – pleasant smiling (su:pleasant | hāsām:smiling); गौरी (gaurī) – Goddess Gouri; देवी (devī) – goddess; पशुपति (paśupati) – Lord Pasupathi; मनोल्लासिनी (manollāsinī) – joy of the mind (manaḥ:mind | ullāsinī:joy); अर्धनारीम् (ardhanārīm) – half-lady-featured (ardha:half | nārīm:lady); वाणीं (vāṇīṃ) – goddess Vaani; देवीं (devīṃ) – goddess; सुरवरनुतां (suravaranutāṃ) – worshipped by good musical notes (sura:good | vara:musical notes | nutāṃ:worshipped); सर्व (sarva) – all; कामार्थ (kāmārtha) – desires and purposes (kāma:desires | artha:purposes); सिध्दयै (sidhdayai) – for fulfilment; वंदे (vaṃde) – bow to; ब्रह्म (brahma) – Brahma; प्रियतमसतिं (priyatamasatiṃ) – beloved and chaste consort (priyatama:beloved | satiṃ:chaste consort); सर्व (sarva) – all; विद्या (vidyā) – education; प्रदात्रीम् (pradātrīm) – bestower;
